payload.description:
Validate that all components are working before running on real data.

## Test Checklist

- [ ] YAML syntax validation passes
- [ ] MCP tool `plexus_evaluation_compare` is registered
- [ ] CLI command `plexus procedure optimize` exists and shows help
- [ ] Identifier resolution works for name/key/ID/externalID
- [ ] Procedure YAML loads without errors

## Commands to Run

```bash
# 1. Validate YAML syntax
python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('plexus/procedures/feedback_alignment_optimizer.yaml'))"

# 2. Check CLI help
plexus procedure optimize --help

# 3. Test identifier resolution (dry run, quick)
plexus procedure optimize -s "AW Confirmation" -c <test-score> --days 7 --dry-run
```

## Success Criteria

All smoke tests pass without errors.
payload.title: Run smoke tests and validate core functionality
